description: Metaview is an AI recruiting platform for sourcing, interview notes, application review, outreach, and reporting. It integrates with recruiting systems and lets AI tools query workspace interview and hiring data through its MCP server.
summary: Metaview exposes a documented MCP server at https://mcp.metaview.ai/mcp, which supports OAuth sign-in with a Metaview account or a Metaview-generated API key; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI surfaced in the public docs searched.
